name: Counsel
description: Legal and professional services theme with warm cream backgrounds, deep navy authority, and muted oxblood accents. Georgia serif body type and document-inspired layouts for trustworthy advisory interfaces.

decorators.counsel-page: Warm cream document page (#FAF7F2) with generous margins and serif body text. Document-inspired foundation.
decorators.counsel-header: Georgia or Garamond serif heading with deep navy color. Formal section and page headers.
decorators.counsel-citation: Indented citation blocks with left border accent and italic serif type. Legal reference styling.
decorators.counsel-seal: Official seal with ribbon embellishment in navy and oxblood. Authority and certification mark.
decorators.counsel-highlight: Subtle highlight on key text using warm cream background tint. Marks important passages.
decorators.counsel-margin: Annotation margin area with dashed divider for notes and references. Legal pad aesthetic.
decorators.counsel-oxblood: Deep oxblood red accent elements for emphasis, warnings, and critical status indicators.
decorators.counsel-divider: Thin horizontal rule with warm border tone for clean section separation.

case-dashboard.description: Legal case dashboard with matter listings, docket calendar, and client directory.

document.description: Legal document viewer with serif body, citation styling, and annotation margins.

marketing.description: Law firm marketing page with authoritative serif headlines and seal branding.

client-portal.description: Client portal with case status, document access, and secure messaging.

counsel-page.description: Warm cream document page (#FAF7F2) with generous margins and serif body text. Document-inspired foundation.
counsel-page.intent: Use as the root background for all counsel pages. The warm cream evokes traditional legal documents and bond paper.

counsel-header.description: Georgia or Garamond serif heading with deep navy color. Formal section and page headers.
counsel-header.intent: Use for all headings to maintain formal, authoritative tone. Navy communicates trust and professionalism.

counsel-citation.description: Indented citation blocks with left border accent and italic serif type. Legal reference styling.
counsel-citation.intent: Use for legal citations, case references, and quoted authorities. Traditional legal document styling.

counsel-seal.description: Official seal with ribbon embellishment in navy and oxblood. Authority and certification mark.
counsel-seal.intent: Use for brand marks, certifications, and authority indicators. Evokes notary and bar association seals.

counsel-highlight.description: Subtle highlight on key text using warm cream background tint. Marks important passages.
counsel-highlight.intent: Use to emphasize critical text passages without the harshness of yellow highlighter. Restrained emphasis.

counsel-margin.description: Annotation margin area with dashed divider for notes and references. Legal pad aesthetic.
counsel-margin.intent: Use for annotation margins where reviewers add notes. Echoes yellow legal pad margins.

counsel-oxblood.description: Deep oxblood red accent elements for emphasis, warnings, and critical status indicators.
counsel-oxblood.intent: Use for emphasis and critical indicators. The muted oxblood avoids alarm while signaling importance.

counsel-divider.description: Thin horizontal rule with warm border tone for clean section separation.
counsel-divider.intent: Use to separate document sections with restraint. The warm tone harmonizes with the cream page.
